description: Border box width is hardcoded to 45 in view.go. For longer project names or paths, text gets truncated. Research TUI widget sizing patterns and implement dynamic sizing that adapts to terminal width while maintaining readability
note: Implemented dynamic border box sizing: Added width/height fields to Model struct, handle WindowSizeMsg to track terminal dimensions, calculate dynamic box width (terminal width - 4, min 45, max 120) in View function. Box now adapts to terminal width while maintaining readability with minimum and maximum constraints.
acceptance_criteria: Border box should adapt to terminal width instead of hardcoded 45
Text should not be truncated unnecessarily for long project names/paths
Implementation should follow established patterns from charmbracelet/lipgloss or similar TUI libraries
Should maintain proper padding and readability
